name: Maigret
description: Open-source OSINT tool collecting detailed dossiers from 3,000+ websites by username. Features built-in web UI, recursive search, AI profiling, and multiple report formats.
author: soxoj

form_fields.label: Web UI Port
form_fields.hint: Port for the built-in web interface. Must match the port configured above.

form_fields.label: AI Analysis > OpenAI API Key
form_fields.hint: Optional. Enables AI-powered investigation summaries when set. Uses OpenAI-compatible API (also works with local endpoints).

form_fields.label: Cloudflare Bypass > FlareSolverr URL
form_fields.hint: Optional. URL to your FlareSolverr instance for bypassing Cloudflare protection on target sites.
